problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
hypothesis: If Neuroinflammation reduction via microglial targeting is applied to alone, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
